summary: Nexus PLM Phase 1 Features - All 28/28 backend tests PASSED. Tested: enhanced tasks with due dates, work item types (task/story/bug/epic/subtask), subtasks, comments, attachments, activity logs, My Tasks view, project-config endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Code properly implements all Phase 1 PLM features
Activity logging correctly tracks created, status, priority, and due_date changes
Subtask creation increments parent subtask_count as expected
Comments and attachments correctly increment/decrement counts on task
GET /tasks/{id}/attachments correctly excludes base64 data field, GET /task-attachments/{id} includes it
My Tasks endpoint properly filters by assignee_id and enriches with project_name
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed tasks during testing for: bug, epic, story, subtasks, comments, attachments, activity log, and my-tasks tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: PLM Phase 1 features fully tested. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_plm_phase1_features.py. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://ai-chat-recovery.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_plm_phase1_features.py -v. All endpoints working: task creation with item_type/due_date/labels/story_points, subtasks with parent_task_id, comments (add/list/delete), attachments (upload/list/get with data), activity logs, my-tasks with filters, project-config.

task_creation_new_fields.POST with item_type=bug: PASS - Stores bug type, due_date, labels, story_points correctly
task_creation_new_fields.initial_counts: PASS - subtask_count, comment_count, attachment_count initialized to 0

subtasks.POST with parent_task_id: PASS - Creates subtask, increments parent subtask_count

comments.POST /api/tasks/{id}/comments: PASS - Adds comment with author_name, increments comment_count
comments.GET /api/tasks/{id}/comments: PASS - Returns comments sorted by date

attachments.GET /api/tasks/{id}/attachments: PASS - Lists attachments without data field
attachments.GET /api/task-attachments/{id}: PASS - Returns full attachment with base64 data

activity_log.GET /api/tasks/{id}/activity: PASS - Returns activity log with created event
activity_log.status_change_logged: PASS - PUT with status change creates activity entry
activity_log.priority_change_logged: PASS - PUT with priority change creates activity entry
activity_log.due_date_change_logged: PASS - PUT with due_date creates activity entry

my_tasks.GET /api/my-tasks: PASS - Returns tasks assigned to current user with project_name enrichment
